name: iron-aura-root
description: Root script content to run Iron Aura frontend

scripts.kill-port: powershell -Command "$port = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($port) { Stop-Process -Id $port.OwningProcess -Force }" 2>$null || echo Port 3000 is free
scripts.clean-start: npm run kill-port && timeout /t 1 /nobreak >nul && npm run dev
